request_payload.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy keeps us safe. The recent cyberattacks on our infrastructure prove we can't rely on others forever. Building our own defenses isn't just about security—it's about preserving our freedoms. The alternative? Becoming vulnerable to foreign influence. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
